title: KKR Launches $10 Billion AI Infrastructure Company With Nvidia, Vistra
sentences: KKR Launches $10 Billion AI Infrastructure Company With Nvidia, Vistra Helix Digital Infrastructure will “serve as a single coordination point for hyperscalers’ data centers, power, connectivity and related needs,” KKR said.
